title: peucedanum meyeri
intro: Peucedanum meyeri, a type of fern-like plant native to China, belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is commonly known as Meyer's caraway. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Peucedanum meyeri include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures.
